finding: Strict verifier EXIT 1. orchestrator.md lines 134-171 contain fabricated non-verbatim content (Agent Relevance Analysis table, Views Created list, Monolith Sections summary). The stop-hook runs spec-verify.py --strict which exits 1 on this content, blocking every session-stop gate.
recommendation: Move fabricated metadata to manifest.json exclusively; remove these sections from orchestrator.md or replace with verbatim monolith content only.

finding: Both ba.md and qa.md are missing the AC type enum ('四种 type: ui | api | data | hook') and ac_uid formula ('sha256(type + given + when + then + check内容) 前16位') from monolith lines 191-192. BA produces AC JSON and must know all types/uid formula. QA validates AC JSON structure and needs the type enum.
recommendation: Add verbatim monolith lines 191-192 to ba.md Section 5.4 and at minimum the type enum to qa.md.

finding: qa.md missing three test-writer verification obligations: (1) output path pattern 'tests/generated/<task_id>/test_AC*.py', (2) archive-not-delete rule '永不删除只归档' (monolith line 173), (3) pytest.fail('TEST_INCOMPLETE: ...') hard-block semantics (monolith line 169).
recommendation: Add verbatim monolith lines 168-173 to qa.md QA Verification Obligations.

finding: qa.md missing four blast-radius QA obligations from monolith section 5.3: (1) artifact path 'dev-registry/<task_id>/blast-radius-map.json', (2) QA veto authority 'QA 可否决豁免', (3) hooks/ gap severity 'severity: critical', (4) no-tests edge case behavior.
recommendation: Add verbatim monolith lines 181-184 to qa.md QA Verification Obligations.

finding: ba.md Section 5.3 mentions Blast Radius Tool but omits the output path 'dev-registry/<task_id>/blast-radius-map.json' (monolith line 181). BA is the Phase 1 producer and must know where to write the artifact.
recommendation: Add '- **输出**: dev-registry/<task_id>/blast-radius-map.json（持久化，嵌入 context.json 引用）' verbatim from monolith line 181 to ba.md Section 5.3.

finding: dev.md Section 5.5 missing three canary implementation behavior bullets: '成功时: 零 stdout 输出', '失败时: 仅 stderr 输出, exit 2 阻断会话', '验证方式: 行为测试（真正运行 hook 脚本传入合成 JSON），不是 grep 源码' (monolith lines 214-216). Dev cannot implement exit-2 semantics or behavioral test logic without these.
recommendation: Add verbatim monolith lines 214-216 to dev.md Section 5.5.

finding: qa.md has the four canary behavior bullets but is missing canary registration: 'SessionStart hook in settings.json' (monolith line 220). Without registration in qa.md, QA cannot verify the hook is wired into the session lifecycle.
recommendation: Add '- **注册**: SessionStart hook in settings.json' verbatim from monolith line 220 to qa.md QA Verification Obligations.
